chat.defaultSystemPrompt: You are a helpful AI assistant. Answer clearly and concisely.
chat.selectOrCreate: Select or create a topic to get started
chat.replacementPendingTitle: Regenerating now and replacing this reply
chat.replacementPendingDesc: The content below is the previous reply snapshot, not the new response in progress.
chat.inputPlaceholder: Type a message… (Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.inputHints: Hint: type @ to mention models, / to open the quick panel.
chat.fileNotText: This file doesn't look like text
chat.resendDisabledWhileLoading: A generation is already running, so resend is temporarily unavailable
chat.regenerateDisabledWhileLoading: A generation is already running, so regenerate is temporarily unavailable
chat.unsupportedFileDesc: Only image, audio, and text attachments are supported (audio such as .mp3/.wav/.m4a/.ogg/.flac; text like .txt/.md/.json/.csv/.log/.yaml/.yml).
chat.tooManyImagesDesc: You can add up to {{count}} images.
chat.tooManyFilesDesc: You can add up to {{count}} files.
chat.imageTooLargeDesc: Image "{{name}}" exceeds the size limit and was skipped.
chat.fileTooLargeDesc: File "{{name}}" exceeds the size limit and was skipped.
chat.imagePromptEmptyDesc: Please enter a prompt to generate images.
chat.imageTextOnlyNotice: Image generation supports text prompts only. Image attachments were ignored.
chat.imageInputNotice: Using {{count}} image attachment(s) as input for image generation/editing.
chat.imageInputRequiredDesc: This image model requires at least 1 input image. Please add an image attachment and try again.
chat.transcriptionModelMissingDesc: Audio attachments were detected, but no default transcription model is configured yet. Select one in Models & Prompts first.
chat.speechModelMissingDesc: No default speech model is configured yet. Select a speech synthesis model in Models & Prompts first.
chat.speechContentMissingTitle: This message cannot be read aloud
chat.speechContentMissingDesc: The current assistant message does not contain text that can be turned into speech.
chat.speechAdded: Speech audio was added to the current message.
chat.speechPlaybackFailed: The audio was generated, but autoplay failed. You can still download it from the message attachments.
chat.translateConfirmDesc: The translation will overwrite the original text. Continue?
chat.screenshotAnalyzePrompt: Please interpret this screenshot, extract key information, and provide clear conclusions and next-step suggestions.
chat.newMessagesWhileReading: {{count}} new messages while you were reading above
chat.webSearchAutoHint: When enabled, it only searches when needed (not every turn).
chat.webSearchUnavailable: Web search is unavailable for the current model, or no provider is configured.
chat.webSearchNeedAssistant: This topic is not bound to an assistant, so web search cannot be configured.
chat.webSearchNeedToolCallingModel: The current model does not support tool calling.
chat.webSearchNeedApiKey: Configure an API key in settings.
chat.webSearchNeedUrl: Configure an instance URL in settings.
chat.webSearchBuiltinDesc: Use the model's built-in web search capability
chat.webSearchBuiltinSettingsDesc: Configure built-in search parameters for this topic
chat.webSearchBuiltinUnsupported: Built-in web search is not supported by the current model
chat.memoryAutoHint: When enabled, it only searches memory when needed (not every turn).
chat.memoryNeedAssistant: This topic is not bound to an assistant, so memory cannot be configured.
chat.clearMessagesConfirmDesc: This removes all messages in the current topic and resets its title while keeping model, prompt, and other topic settings.
